title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share Data toggle remains visible after logging in with Poly credentials, when it should only appear in guest mode.
steps: Start app fresh and go through onboarding.
Tap 'Continue as Guest' and choose Share/Don't Share.
Go to App Settings > General > Account — the Share Data toggle is shown correctly.
Tap 'Log in' and log in with Poly credentials — the Share Data toggle should disappear (since it's a guest-only setting), but it remains visible.
After logging out, the toggle reappears but its ON/OFF state depends on the guest choice from step 1.
expected: The Share Data toggle should not be shown after the user logs in, and should only appear in guest mode.
